CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-20-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Bank Of America's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice And Motion To Admit And Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael Mau, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party: SMB Construction
Robert Wood, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & opposing party: O'Mike's Construction Co.


Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted as modified: Motion Of Defendants and Cross-Complainants SMB Construction, Inc., George Birmingham, and Sean Birmingham To Admit And To Compel Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Special Interrogatories (Set Two) within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $700, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Resposnes And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants SMB Construction, Inc., George Birminham, Sean Birminham's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Defendant's form interrogatories, special interrogatories, requests for production, and to produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's Requests For Admissions are deemed admitted. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,030, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
